title: Tankers Research Update
summary:
Main
How small do Chinese-built tankers have to be to avoid port fees when discharging in US ports? Yesterday pointed out that China-built tankers under 80,000 DWT would be exempt from USTR fees, assuming they were not Chinese-owned or operated. While there is no ambiguity that this exemption applies to vessels under 55,000 DWT, we should have mentioned that some ambiguity remains for vessels between 55,000 and 80,000 DWT.
